word: H5267 - נְסַק - nᵉçaq - nes-ak' - Take up

sections.paragraph:
Original: נסק

Transliteration: nesaq

Phonetic: nes-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to ascend, come up
    1. (Aphel) to lift, take up
    2. (Hophal) to be taken up

Origin: corresponding to H5266

TWOT entry: 2889

Part(s) of speech: Verb
